name: dev.ucp.shopping.split_payments
title: Split Payments Extension
description: Enables buyers to use multiple payment instruments for a single checkout.

payment_instrument.title: Payment Instrument (Split Payments)
payment_instrument.description: Payment instrument extended with an optional amount for split payments.

amount.description: Requested contribution for this instrument in ISO 4217 minor units. On request: the platform's requested amount (omit for business-determined). On response: the actual amount contributed (always present).

dev.ucp.shopping.checkout.title: Checkout with Split Payments
dev.ucp.shopping.checkout.description: Checkout extended with split payment instrument amounts.

instruments.description: Payment instruments in allocation priority order.
